name: Maverick Force 3 Profile
comment: Maverick Force 3 Profile brings quick movement and fast effects together in a blazingly bright LED yoke profile fixture that harnesses the latest technology to deliver 40,906 lumens of output. Precision optics capture the depth of a CMY + CTO color mixing system renowned for its real reds and maintain a flat field of focus even when taking its 10:1 zoom fully wide. Color calibration and gobo selection comes matched to other Force fixtures in the rig, along with the advanced 4-blade shutter frame system and effects wheelhouse that delivers the great static, rotating, and animation effects the Force series is known for. Take control with DMX, RDM, sACN, Art-Net, or W-DMX.
